data.name: CYBER SEX Horny Nurses
data.detailed_description:
Cyber SEX Horny nurses is a Porn Game created for Virtual Reality,
which is set in the future at JOY RESORT center where nurses and modern technology
take care of the health of visitors through SEXUAL treatments.

You are a patient of this unique resort.
You can explore the resort of the future, visit all attractions and sexual treatments.

Welcome to JOY RESORT, thank you for choosing our spa center.
We invite you the healthy room where our nurses will take care of you.
There is also an outdoor jacuzzi available for our guests.
If you want to talk about our center, we invite you to the boss's room on the first floor.
In matters of safety, we invite you to the security room.

Enter the simulation zone you will find our virtual reality simulations
created by JOY RESORT TECHNOLOGY. Passing the simulation zone,
you will find an entrance to the outside garden.

The satisfaction of our guests is our priority.

  • Visit Sexual Treatments: Healing Treatments performed by Sexy Nurses.

  • Cyberpunk Simulation Zone: Move to the Cyberpunk World and its Sexy Girls.

  • Succubus Simulation Zone: Seductive, Dark and Very Sexy.

  • Employees of JOY RESORT: Meet other staff who really care about the good opinion of JOY RESORT.

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 荷蘭文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文, 匈牙利文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-6600 (or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce RTX 2060
  • 儲存空間: 28 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-6600 (or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 32 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce RTX 30XX series
  • 儲存空間: 28 MB 可用空間
